title: CRM & Outreach Platform
description: Self-hosted CRM deployment and business automation platform for a private investment advisor. EspoCRM, DNS, SMTP/IMAP, contact normalization, and investor outreach templating. Zero subscription cost.
markdown:
## What
Full-stack CRM deployment and business automation platform for Loryx Capital, a private investment advisory entity. Self-hosted EspoCRM on a Mac Mini running 24/7 as a homelab server, with custom domain via OVH, inbound email via Zimbra (IMAP), outbound campaigns via Brevo (SMTP), and a contact normalization pipeline for investor deal flow outreach.

## How
Deployed EspoCRM in Docker on a self-hosted Mac Mini configured as a personal cloud server. Configured custom domain via OVH with DNS records (MX, SPF, DKIM, DMARC) for reliable email deliverability. Set up Zimbra IMAP for inbound mail sync into EspoCRM and Brevo SMTP for outbound transactional and campaign emails. Built a Python data ingestion tool to load, deduplicate, and normalize contacts from heterogeneous sources into a structured CRM schema. Designed outreach email templates for investment opportunity communications targeting venture capital contacts.

## Result
Fully operational self-hosted CRM used in production by Loryx Capital. The alternative was Salesforce or HubSpot Starter ($240 to $600 per year before hitting feature limits). This setup costs a single domain name (~15 EUR per year): EspoCRM is open source, Brevo free tier covers 300 emails per day which comfortably fits the client outreach volume, and the server runs on existing homelab hardware. End-to-end ownership from infrastructure and email configuration to business workflow design, delivering a system a non-technical client can operate independently.

### AI Usage (Referencing)
AI was used to research appropriate technologies for the client's specific use cases and assist with configuration and debugging. Architecture decisions, DNS setup, email pipeline design, and the contact normalization tool were implemented manually.
